signals.headline: Tether Backs $150M Drift Protocol Recovery on Solana (April 16, 2026)** | YES | HIGH
signals.raw:
Tether Backs $150M Drift Protocol Recovery on Solana (April 16, 2026)** | YES | HIGH  
Tether announced a recovery plan of up to $150M for users hit by Drift's $285M exploit on April 1, expanding USDT's role on Solana and signaling strong ecosystem support amid security concerns.[3][4]

signals.headline: SOUTH KOREA ANNUAL INFLATION RISES TO 2
signals.raw:
SOUTH KOREA ANNUAL INFLATION RISES TO 2.2% IN MARCH 2026, ABOVE PRIOR 2.0% BUT BELOW 2.4% FORECASTS | NO | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in January and February, remaining near the Bank of Korea's 2% target amid contained price pressures before Middle East-driven energy volatility.[1]

signals.headline: Solana ETFs See $5
signals.raw:
Solana ETFs See $5.04M Net Inflows (April 16, 2026)** | YES | HIGH  
U.S. spot Solana ETFs recorded $5.04M inflows on April 16, following $5.36M prior, with cumulative assets at $835M, indicating sustained institutional demand.[4]

signals.raw:
Solana Hits 167M Monthly Token Holders Record (April 14, 2026)** | YES | MED
